problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: TenderIQ — AI-Powered Multi-Agent Tender Evaluation Platform for Government Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform that automates the tender evaluation pipeline while keeping a human officer in control, handles various document formats, and produces explainable evaluation reports.
optimization_claims: No bidder is ever silently disqualified — every uncertain case surfaces in a human review queue with the exact reason
Every verdict cites the specific document, page number, and excerpt that drove the decision
The system handles scanned documents and certificate photographs, not just digital files
Full audit trail per agent action — suitable for RTI and procurement audit requirements
